summary: Iteration 37 - Remote VA Scan functionality testing complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: VA page with remote scan button, progress bar, and all components working correctly. All new endpoints (request-scan, scan-status, update-scan-status, process-scan-results, connector/managed-devices) are functional.

backend_api: POST /api/vulnerability/request-scan/{client_id} - Endpoint exists and returns 200/400/409 appropriately
POST /api/vulnerability/request-scan/{client_id} - Returns scan_id when connector online
POST /api/connector/managed-devices - Returns devices array with API key auth
POST /api/connector/heartbeat - Returns pending_commands filtered by client_id
Full remote scan flow: request -> status -> update -> results works end-to-end
frontend_ui: Stats section [data-testid='va-stats'] shows 13 devices, 22 vulns, 8 critical, 2 high
'Avvia Scansione Remota' button [data-testid='va-run-scan-btn'] present and clickable
409 response shows toast 'Una scansione VA è già in corso'
Device cards [data-testid='va-device-*'] show score, name, IP, status, vuln counts
Device expansion shows detailed vulnerabilities with severity, title, description, remediation

critical_code_review_comments: vulnerability.py: Request import correctly added at line 5
vulnerability.py: request-scan endpoint correctly checks connector online status (last_seen < 5 min)
vulnerability.py: request-scan correctly prevents duplicate scans (409 if pending/dispatched)
vulnerability.py: process-scan-results correctly updates device_poll_status with open_ports
connector.py: pending_commands query correctly filters by client_id for security
connector.py: managed-devices endpoint correctly validates API key
VulnerabilityPage.js: Remote scan button calls request-scan endpoint
VulnerabilityPage.js: Scan progress bar [data-testid='va-scan-progress'] shows during scanning
VulnerabilityPage.js: Polls scan-status every 3 seconds during scan
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing demo data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 verified the NEW remote VA scan functionality. All endpoints working: request-scan (creates pending command for connector), scan-status (returns current scan state), update-scan-status (connector updates progress), process-scan-results (connector sends results). Frontend 'Avvia Scansione Remota' button works and shows progress bar during scanning. The connector heartbeat pending_commands are now correctly filtered by client_id for security. Note: When testing request-scan, if connector is offline you get 400, if scan already in progress you get 409.
